markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 1. The Department of Motor Vehicles [1500 - 1825]
#### Article 1. Organization of Department [1500 - 1507]
##### § 1504

The department is under the control of a civil executive officer known as the Director of Motor Vehicles. The director shall be appointed by, and hold office at the pleasure of, the Governor.

*(Amended by Stats. 1984, Ch. 268, Sec. 32.2. Effective June 29, 1984.)*
